articles.description: Asia stocks rise on upbeat China PMI; tech spurs bumper quarter
articles.content: Investing.com-- Most Asian stocks rose on Tuesday, with Chinese markets buoyed by stronger-than-expected business activity data, while strong gains in technology shares put regional bourses on track … [+3773 chars]
